response.overview: Google Play got some time to hang out with all the members of Slipknot, who went through their entire history as a band, which has spanned nearly 20 years. As they released their long-awaited fifth studio album, .5: The Gray Chapter, Slipknot look back on the  passing of their co-founder and bassist Paul Gray, and at their nearly two decades of trials, tribulations, victories and tragedies as a band. Forget the headlines, look past the masks, and watch as the band themselves tell the story of Slipknot.
response.title: Slipknot - Audiobiography
